name: Chicken Supreme Canape
recipeIngredient: White pepper and salt to taste
Pastry Shells: You can either buy phyllo shells or purchase made-up pastry shells that look like sea shells. Any small, canape-sized pastry shell will work.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together. This can be made 1 day ahead without the vinaigrette dressing.
2. Pour the vinaigrette dressing and mix with the chicken mixture right before filling pastry shells.
3. Fill pastry shells and top with parsley.
Caper Vinaigrette
